atomic_facts.fact: The recipe title is 'maple-glazed APPLE-CHICKEN SAUSAGE BITES'.
The recipe lists '12 to 16-ounce package cooked apple-flavor chicken sausage links' as the first ingredient.
The recipe instructions include preheating the oven to 375°F.
A finger is pointing specifically near the '1 tablespoon' measurement in the ingredient list.
Part of another recipe title 'buffalo' is visible on the right page.

ocr: 1 Preheat oven to 375°F. Cut sausage into 1-inch slices.
Place in a shallow baking pan. For maple glaze, in a small
bowl combine maple syrup, mustard, and sage.
2 Bake sausage for 8 minutes. Brush generously with
maple glaze. Bake about 8 minutes more or until sausage
is glazed and thoroughly heated through, stirring once.
3 Use pretzel sticks as edible toothpicks to serve
